docs.title: Welcome to Prettier Maps
docs.text: Prettier Maps helps makes working in QGIS easier.

docs.title: Dependencies
docs.text: The only dependency is MapTiler. This plugin is designed to work with MapTiler vector layers.

docs.title: Installation
docs.text: To install the plugin, either install it directly from QGIS plugins or download the zip file from the releases page and install it in QGIS.

docs.title: Usage
docs.text: To use the plugin, open a Vector map from MapTiler and then open the Prettier Maps plugin. There you will see a list of layers that you can enable/disable.
